blended.narrative: Marble Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,043 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
